headline: AAPL receives analyst upgrade after strong device demand
summary: Multiple firms raised targets after holiday activation beats expectations.

headline: AAPL faces renewed antitrust probe in Europe
summary: Regulators expanded an existing review and requested additional data.

headline: AAPL announces enterprise partnership with logistics leader
summary: The partnership expands installed base and expected recurring revenue.

headline: AAPL shares drop briefly after broker downgrade
summary: One desk downgraded valuation despite no change to shipment estimates.

headline: AAPL posts record services growth in channel update
summary: Channel checks suggest stronger recurring revenue growth and margin expansion.
